title: 4 Pcs Beauty Spatula Mini Spatula Silicone Set Makeup Spatula Multifunctional Small Scraper Lotion Stirrer for Cooking Baking Kitchen Tiny Spatula Jam Jar Cosmetic Narrow Can Thin Bottle
description:
About this item
【High Material】Our small spatula is made of high-quality silicone, food-grade material inside, strong and durability material, mini spatula silicone can be use on any food and cosmetics, and the tiny spoon will not scratch your pots and pans, peanut butter stirrer tool can make cooking and baking more enjoyable.
【Beauty Spatula Set】The cosmetic spatula’s small size and varying lengths allow you to use bottles and jars of various sizes and shapes, peanut butter spoon reduces product waste. Lip applicator silicone is also good for scraping out the last bits of peanut butter, jam, or other condiments from jars.
【Sturdy and Durability】This small scraper tool is very sturdy and has a metal rod inside for support. The exterior has a silicone coating. long handle spatula is a must-have in your small kitchen gadget collection, mini makeup spatula is ideal for all your baking needs as it stores the spatula in a mini jar.
【Easy to Clean】The silicone jar spatula can run in the dishwasher, the tiny spatula has a seamless design, and the tool is easy to hand wash, last drop spatula prevents food and dirt from accumulating, making food scraper safe and healthy to use. The spoon is easy to clean and stores with other household gadgets.
【Widely Use】 This stir sticks to empty containers to reduce waste and ensure your ingredients are fully utilized. Lotion scoop is ideal for stirring, scraping, and folding a variety of foods, an extendable spoon can also be use for peanut butter and ketchup, jars, honey, cosmetics, hand cream, body lotion, foundation, shampoo, lip gloss, and more.
reviews_5s:
I love this set of 4 mini spatulas that come in different colors and 3 different sizes. They are made of good quality silicone and are easy to hand wash or can be washed in the dishwasher. They have a flat side and a rounded side to allow you to really clean out whatever container you are emptying.

I like to get the last bit of lotion out of my cosmetic jar and the smallest one worked great. I used the mid sized one to clean out my coffee grinder container and it also did a great job. The longest ones work well for cleaning out jars like the ketchup bottle I just emptied. The end is flexible, but the shaft is stiff and holds up well when scraping things out. I think they are well priced and I'm pleased with my decision to get them.
